goals.title: G1 API contract first cut
goals.objective: Produce backend/openapi.yaml and backend/app/schemas.py with Pydantic models that mirror KnowledgeNode, KnowledgeEdge, LearningPath, KnowledgeDetail, KnowledgeEvidence, and CandidateKnowledge from src/data/. No runtime code yet; OpenAPI must be referenceable. Quality gate: npm test -- --run green, npm run build green, pytest for any new module.

goals.title: G2 FastAPI skeleton + SQLite seed
goals.objective: Stand up minimal FastAPI app in backend/app/main.py exposing GET /api/health, GET /api/nodes, GET /api/edges, GET /api/paths. backend/scripts/seed.py reads src/data/knowledgeGraph.ts and loads it into a SQLite file. Tests use pytest with httpx.AsyncClient. Quality gate: same as G1 plus the four read endpoints return the seed data with status 200.

goals.title: G3 Frontend dual-source adapter
goals.objective: Frontend prefers fetch from VITE_API_BASE (default http://localhost:8000) and falls back to existing TypeScript constants on fetch failure or 5xx. Add src/lib/apiClient.ts. Keep npm test and npm run build green; the 9 existing Vitest cases must still pass. Quality gate: same as G1 plus a new test that toggles fetch success/failure to confirm fallback behavior.

goals.title: G4 Review Queue UI (static)
goals.objective: Add src/components/ReviewQueue.tsx rendering existing candidateKnowledge data with Approve / Reject / Edit affordances. Wire it into App.tsx as a third surface alongside Graph Map and Detail Drawer. State is local React state only — no persistence yet. Quality gate: same as G1 plus at least one Vitest case for the queue component rendering and the three action callbacks.

goals.title: G5 Candidate write API + audit
goals.objective: Add GET/POST /api/candidates and PATCH /api/candidates/{id} plus an audit table that records reviewer, timestamp, action (approve/reject/edit). Wire Review Queue UI to call the API. Pydantic + SQLAlchemy migrations included. Quality gate: same as G1 plus pytest covering the three write paths and the audit row creation. Review invariant enforced: there is no endpoint that writes to approved nodes directly from an agent context.

goals.title: G6 Local git analyzer
goals.objective: Add POST /api/git/analyze that takes a local repo path, runs git log heuristics, and produces candidate entries with evidence.type === 'git' and commitHash. Triggers are explicit user actions, never automatic. Quality gate: same as G1 plus pytest using a fixture git repo to assert the produced candidates carry the correct evidence fields.

goals.title: G7 Configurable model API + web research agent
goals.objective: Add backend config for a model provider (env-driven, e.g. MODEL_PROVIDER, MODEL_API_KEY) and POST /api/research that does web research with citations and writes candidates with evidence.type === 'web'. Quality gate: same as G1 plus pytest that mocks the model provider and asserts the candidate has at least one web evidence with urlOrPath and date.

goals.title: G8 LearningAgent adapter
goals.objective: Add integrations/learning-agent/ with client.py (REST) and mcp_client.py (MCP). Add src/components/LearningAgentPanel.tsx sidebar that queries LearningAgent only through the adapter — never by importing Python. Quality gate: same as G1 plus pytest mocking the adapter transport and a Vitest case for the panel that asserts it calls the adapter, not LearningAgent internals.

goals.title: G9 Local docker-compose deployment
goals.objective: Add docker-compose.yml with web, api, and optional learning-agent services. Add an nginx-style config for the web container with SPA fallback (try_files). Volume for SQLite. docker compose up brings the whole stack online. Quality gate: docker compose config parses cleanly; docker compose build succeeds for at least web and api without external network if pre-cached.

goals.title: G10 End-to-end tests + documentation
goals.objective: Add Playwright (or Vitest browser) smoke for the dual-source fallback, the Review Queue approve flow, and the LearningAgent adapter mock. Update README.md with new run commands. Add docs/architecture/api-boundary.md. Final ultragoal checkpoint must pass ai-slop-cleaner and the independent code-review APPROVE + architect CLEAR gate. Quality gate: same as G1 plus the new e2e suite green and a successful final clean checkpoint with --quality-gate-json.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
